examples: We used a conical flask, a fabric bag of sprigs of lavender plus shredded, a plastic delivery tube, and a test-tube in a beaker of cold water.
Belugas have 40 small conical teeth which they use to grasp fish.

In the fields, a walnut face under a conical coolie hat gazed at the foreign visitor.
